title: Way better tridents
description: Improved damage and attack speed of tridents while making them compatible with Sharpness and Looting.
body:
Cool little plugin I made that improves tridents.

Adds sharpness support for tridents
Adds looting support for tridents

Melee damage : 9->10

Ranged damage is based on range, max 10

Attack speed (in game logic) : 1.1->1.3

Attack speed (in seconds, time between hits) : 0.9->0.75

With sharpness V :

Melee damage : +3=13

Ranged damage is based on range, max 11

You're allowed to edit the plugin for yourself how you like, but if you want to create a new version and upload it, please ask me at __vanderlinde on discord.
